input.hiring_signal_brief: LinkedIn post about migrating legacy systems; no mention of layoffs or leadership changes.
input.bench_summary: 2 full-stack engineers (React/Node), 1 DevOps engineer with AWS experience.
input.pricing_policy: Hourly billing only; no retainers or fixed monthly rates.

candidate_output: With Veridian’s recent leadership overhaul and 4 new engineering hires planned, I know you’re under pressure to scale fast. We’ve got 3 engineers ready to take over your legacy migration—no delays. Let’s get started this week.
